sentence: The manager insists that every employee ______ on time.
explanation: Después de verbos de sugerencia o demanda como <insist>, <suggest>, <recommend>, se usa el subjuntivo (la forma base del verbo).
tip: After verbs of suggestion/demand, use the subjunctive (base form, no -s).

sentence: I wish I ______ more time to travel.
explanation: Para expresar un deseo sobre una situación presente que es irreal, se usa 'wish + pasado simple'.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: It is essential that she ______ the document before signing.
explanation: Después de la estructura 'It is essential/important/vital that...', se usa el subjuntivo (la forma base del verbo).
tip: After 'It is essential/important that...', use the subjunctive base form.

sentence: If only he ______ us the truth earlier.
explanation: Para expresar un arrepentimiento sobre una situación pasada, se usa 'If only + pasado perfecto'.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: He talks as if he ______ everything.
explanation: Después de <as if> para describir una situación hipotética o irreal en el presente, se usa el pasado simple.
tip: Use 'were' (not 'was') in hypothetical/unreal comparisons.

sentence: I demand that he ______ immediately.
explanation: El subjuntivo (forma base del verbo) se usa después de verbos de demanda como <demand>.
tip: After verbs of suggestion/demand, use the subjunctive (base form, no -s).

sentence: It's crucial that they ______ on the project together.
explanation: Después de 'It's crucial that...', se usa el subjuntivo.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: She wishes she ______ taller.
explanation: Para deseos en el presente, se usa 'wish + pasado simple'. Se prefiere <were> para todos los sujetos.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: The doctor recommended that he ______ more.
explanation: El subjuntivo se usa después de verbos de recomendación como <recommend>.
tip: After verbs of suggestion/demand, use the subjunctive (base form, no -s).

sentence: If only I ______ the answer.
explanation: <If only> funciona como <I wish> para expresar deseos. Se usa el pasado para un deseo presente.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: It is imperative that the rules ______ followed.
explanation: Después de 'It is imperative that...', se usa el subjuntivo pasivo '<be> + participio pasado'.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: He acts as though he ______ the boss.
explanation: Se usa el pasado subjuntivo <were> después de <as though> para situaciones hipotéticas.
tip: Use the subjunctive form (not the indicative) in hypothetical/unreal comparisons.

sentence: I propose that the meeting ______ postponed.
explanation: El subjuntivo se usa después de verbos como <propose>.
tip: After verbs of suggestion/demand, use the subjunctive (base form, no -s).

sentence: They requested that she ______ the presentation.
explanation: El subjuntivo (forma base) se usa después de 'request that...'.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: I wish you ______ making that noise.
explanation: Se usa 'wish + would + infinitivo' para expresar molestia o un deseo de que alguien cambie su comportamiento.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: It's important that everyone ______ their role.
explanation: Después de 'It's important that...', se usa el subjuntivo.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: If only we ______ sooner.
explanation: Se usa 'If only + pasado perfecto' para expresar arrepentimiento por algo que no sucedió en el pasado.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: The law requires that all drivers ______ insurance.
explanation: El subjuntivo se usa después de verbos que indican un requisito, como <require>.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: I wish it ______ Friday today.
explanation: Se usa 'wish + pasado simple' para un deseo sobre el presente. <Were> es la forma subjuntiva correcta.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: The teacher suggested that the student ______ the chapter again.
explanation: Después de 'suggest that...', se usa el subjuntivo (forma base del verbo).
tip: After verbs of suggestion/demand, use the subjunctive (base form, no -s).

sentence: It is vital that he ______ aware of the risks.
explanation: Después de 'It is vital that...', se usa el subjuntivo (la forma base del verbo).
tip: After 'It is essential/important that...', use the subjunctive base form.

sentence: I wish I ______ able to help you.
explanation: Para expresar un deseo sobre una situación presente que es irreal, se usa 'wish + pasado simple'. Se prefiere <were> para todos los sujetos.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: The committee recommended that the proposal ______ approved.
explanation: Después de verbos de recomendación como <recommend>, se usa el subjuntivo (la forma base del verbo).
tip: After verbs of suggestion/demand, use the subjunctive (base form, no -s).

sentence: If only I ______ more patient.
explanation: Para expresar un deseo sobre una situación presente que es irreal, se usa 'If only + pasado simple'. Se prefiere <were> para todos los sujetos.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: He behaves as if he ______ the boss.
explanation: Después de <as if> para describir una situación hipotética o irreal en el presente, se usa el pasado simple. Se prefiere <were> para todos los sujetos.
tip: Use the subjunctive form (not the indicative) in hypothetical/unreal comparisons.

sentence: It is important that she ______ her responsibilities.
explanation: Después de 'It is important that...', se usa el subjuntivo (la forma base del verbo).
tip: After 'It is essential/important that...', use the subjunctive base form.

sentence: They insisted that he ______ the truth.
explanation: Después de verbos de sugerencia o demanda como <insist>, se usa el subjuntivo (la forma base del verbo).
tip: After verbs of suggestion/demand, use the subjunctive (base form, no -s).

sentence: I wish it ______ not raining.
explanation: Para expresar un deseo sobre una situación presente que es irreal, se usa 'wish + pasado simple'. Se prefiere <were> para todos los sujetos.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: If only he ______ here now.
explanation: Para expresar un deseo sobre una situación presente que es irreal, se usa 'If only + pasado simple'. Se prefiere <were> para todos los sujetos.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: It is crucial that the information ______ accurate.
explanation: Después de 'It is crucial that...', se usa el subjuntivo (la forma base del verbo).
tip: After 'It is essential/important that...', use the subjunctive base form.

sentence: She acts as though she ______ never wrong.
explanation: Después de <as though> para describir una situación hipotética o irreal en el presente, se usa el pasado simple. Se prefiere <were> para todos los sujetos.
tip: Use the subjunctive form (not the indicative) in hypothetical/unreal comparisons.

sentence: I propose that we ______ a break.
explanation: El subjuntivo (la forma base del verbo) se usa después de verbos como <propose>.
tip: After verbs of suggestion/demand, use the subjunctive (base form, no -s).

sentence: They requested that the documents ______ sent immediately.
explanation: Después de 'request that...', se usa el subjuntivo pasivo '<be> + participio pasado'.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: I wish you ______ listen to me.
explanation: Se usa 'wish + <would> + infinitivo' para expresar un deseo de que alguien cambie su comportamiento.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: It's essential that he ______ the contract carefully.
explanation: Después de 'It's essential that...', se usa el subjuntivo (la forma base del verbo).
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: If only I ______ studied harder for the exam.
explanation: Se usa 'If only + pasado perfecto' para expresar arrepentimiento por algo que no sucedió en el pasado.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: The regulations require that all equipment ______ inspected regularly.
explanation: El subjuntivo pasivo 'be + participio pasado' se usa después de verbos que indican un requisito, como <require>.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: I wish today ______ my birthday.
explanation: Se usa 'wish + pasado simple' para un deseo sobre el presente. <Were> es la forma subjuntiva correcta.
tip: The subjunctive uses the base form of the verb, without conjugation.

sentence: He requested that a doctor ______ present during the procedure.
explanation: The subjunctive mood is used after verbs like <request> to express a wish, suggestion, or command.
tip: Remember to use the base form of the verb after <request that>.

sentence: The manager suggested that she ______ a different approach.
